Amulet of the Sphinx Eye  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
AC: 15
STR: +7 CHA: +3 WIS: +3 INT: +14 MANA: +25
Effect: Ultravision (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Amulet of the Sphinx Eye
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
AC: 15
STR: +7 CHA: +3 WIS: +3 INT: +14 MANA: +25
Effect: Ultravision (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Maikeruu Shadowtraveler
Lucy Entry By:zebantik
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 09:06:11
Page Updated:Sat Jul 25th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shadowknight Test of Bash

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Sky


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

# Aug 06 2002 at 10:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757964843
26 posts
Very close to getting this thing...

Ebon Tessara dropped on isle one.
Azarack didnt drop the opal
Amulet dropped of Gorg on isle three.

Glad my guild is going back soon to air. 15 AC and 14 INT sold me alone on this.
▲ Page top
ewww ultravision effect? well maybe...
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2002 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361724855
View User Forum
3 posts
the very first time i saw this item when i was lvl 20ish i thought to myself, " ultravision ?? why even bother?? " since i am a dark-elf it comes naturally. but now i've come to realize that i really want this ultravision effect. reason being is that sometimes i walk around in skeleton form with shroud of undeath as well as tricksters or wolf form in certain groups and it's a big pain in the butt to have to keep memming shadowsight for the ultravision effect. You'd think that a skeleton would be able to see at night... wtf chuck

Well...

...I guess I would bag my 7/6 for this =)

# Dec 18 2001 at 10:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251515951
281 posts
talk about a boost to mana! really nice AC also. and heck...PVP servers, even better, no drop with ultravision. w00t
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 12 2001 at 12:53 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OK PEOPLE, THIS FORUM IS OF EXCHANGE INFO ABOUT THE ITEM ITSELF, NOT WHO SAW WHO BEAT WHO AND HOW BAD. If you want to talk about who whipped who with what, find a different forum. And to the guy that said they changed HT to Disease not MR, get your facts straight, HT checks MR <<UNLESS>> you are using the Unholy Aura disc. And dueling is 95% about strategy, so this whole "which class is better" arguement is very petty. Besides, this game was made to group up, get in a good group, go get your Phat lootz and stop the pissing contest, just play to have fun=P
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 08 2001 at 1:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nice item...
RE: Ok, just to clear a few thing up...
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2002 at 2:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774045246
View User Forum
4 posts
Uhm, it's only DR based past level 55...

For the facts on HT..

1-54 = MR based
55 - 60 = DR based
AAXP Super Harm Touch = Lure (I think MR) based
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 17 2001 at 6:27 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What the hell why are all the pallys and warriors mad cause of this item it seems so. and BTW to that warr who said he can resist harm touch and such thats craph they change it to disease. 1 snare and fear from a good sk and a warr is dead
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 13 2001 at 6:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I saw a lvl 56 Sk beat a lvl 60 paladin. They sk had epoic and full suit of blood ember. THe pally had Fiery Defender and full suit of deep water. It was before we were going on plain raid. The sk pimped the paladin. So people shut your ******* mouths mosto f use are ignorant *********
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 2:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well, everyone has some sort of answer to everything someone says. In my opinion, SK's are great for dueling. The point in a duel is to win. By any means neccesary. I had a Rogue challenge me to a duel in Sol B (both of us lvl 45). I didn't have HT since it was used on a previous mob so I had to use whatever else I could. The fight began, and like a rogue should, he continually tried backstabbing me. Backing up flat against the wall eliminated that for him. He had some good resists for it took me 4 times for Engulfing Darkness to finally stick on him. Once ED stuck, a good shield bash for the stun gave me time for the Fear to take over. Fear spell stuck on the first casting and I sent him along his way into the dungeon lol. I got called about every name in the book for that move haha. So fellow SK's remember, we have awesome combo's at our disposal. Use them well to shut up these other punks who "claim" they are the best class.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 27 2001 at 12:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hell Whoa ur all so cool
#Anonymous, Posted: May 09 2001 at 5:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Great neclace !
#Anonymous, Posted: May 07 2001 at 12:26 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lol id love to see you fear kite a warrior with 150mr (its REALLY easy for warriors to cap Magic resist)
#Anonymous, Posted: May 05 2001 at 10:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) some of you guys need a clue. sks kill pallys rather easily in duels ....its called fear...ever hear of it? sks actually have dots that do damage and then the harm touch to finish off their poor opponent. all you have to do is fear the screwy pally then dark him and he is done. nothing like beating on the back of another defenseless victim. chanters necro and wizzys are about the only ones who can kill sks in a duel. if a pally wins a duel against an sk of equal level it is because the person playing the sk had no clue how to play. an sk within 5 levels of a pally should kill him easily. and btw harm touch doesn't get resisted within 10 levels anymore no matter what your resist is to magic because its not magic based anymore. and pallys on quellious who want a piece lemme know i'll show you who is boss
RE: dueling
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 4:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756515749
112 posts
A wise paladin is going to resist your fear/darkness... don't assume you are the only one with a head on your shoulders.

A wise SK fears no 'chanter.... disease cloud yourself :)

-bort
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 27 2001 at 2:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) THIS HAS NOTHING TO DO WITH THE ITEM
#Anonymous, Posted: May 05 2001 at 7:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lets ad a few to that list pallys would be a good fight. Druids could kill you very easly. Mages have the best pets and the second best dd. Shamans could do about the same as a druid not as quick but still would win. Rangers would be a good fight. Dont think your dot is that good it sucks compared to pretty much every other class that has dots
#Anonymous, Posted: May 04 2001 at 2:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) SK's suck in a duel nuf said
#Anonymous, Posted: May 04 2001 at 1:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) btw to that stupid erudite sk who thinks he can win anybody... erudite sk:s sucks! rofl
#Anonymous, Posted: May 04 2001 at 5:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) number 1, if your a paladin you'll be LoHing at about 600+ hps or you wont be LoHing at all in a duel vs a competent SK. number 2, wtf kinda person would wana play a paladin anywayz. number 3, 95mr wont be enough considering i've only had a HT resisted with 200mr. number 4, paladins suck, spells suck, class sux, no fun, all they can do is heal in a duel. number 5, sk 58 pet ownz paladins. number 6, come to rallos server where u dont have to wait for a duel to die u panzy AHAHAHA, sk's own paladins alllllll over.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 9:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) BTW... Harmtouch is rolled vs disease not MR.
#REDACTED, Posted: May 05 2001 at 3:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You must have never played a Paladin...they dont suck in anyway..they can alot more than heal. With the right combos and they are very formitable opponents. I have both a Paladin and Shadowknight and enjoy playing both. Another thing you forget.. Paladins get the best weapon in the game the Fiery Defender... now of course to get this sword you darn near have to be a god..but it can still be accomplished. So NEVER underestimate an opponent especially a Paladin.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 15 2001 at 12:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Just to inform you the SK epic, Innoruks Curse, has better damage delay than the pally epic and has 250 lifetap DoT proc that stacks with its self....
#REDACTED, Posted: May 04 2001 at 12:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Come to Vallon Zek and see how much a SK can do in PvP against paladins, heh.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 4:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) POWDERD U NEVER KILLED A ROGUE:P!!!!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 6:54 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) too bad its only for ugly shadow knights :(
#REDACTED, Posted: May 02 2001 at 11:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Nice neck piece for my adversaries. Well it won't matter, your corpse will be littering my yard shortly. :)
RE: Nice

# May 03 2001 at 8:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246723304
5 posts
i've never seen equal level paladins able to kill equal level shadow knights. actually...(I'm a shadow knight) i've killed rogues, monks, mages, wizards, druids and paladins...all yellow or red to me in duels ...too bad you're not on the E'ci server or i'd whup you good >=)
